reviews.author: Lesly Solis
reviews.text: Vive La Crêpe is one of my favorite spots for great crêpes and friendly service. The food is always fresh and flavorful. I was disappointed to learn that the smoothies, especially the Very Berry Smoothie, have been discontinued. It was a refreshing favorite that paired perfectly with a crêpe.I hope Vive La Crêpe considers bringing it back. I still highly recommend this restaurant and would love to see the Very Berry Smoothie return.

reviews.author: Estefania Brito
reviews.text: Las crepas están buenísimas! Y la atención de Victoria inmejorable. Muy recomendable!

reviews.text: Cute little eatery on Lexington.  Saw it on my walk to the 68th street 6 train and stopped in for a quick afternoon snack.  Crepes galore.  Nice!

reviews.text: Everyone was so nice and welcoming, especially Daniel! Food was delicious!

reviews.author: Nisha Desai
reviews.text: This place is a tourist trap French people would scoff at. Taking up prime real estate. Please bring European coffee and crepes back. The hot chocolate was sickeningly sweet

reviews.author: Mustak Ahmed
reviews.text: Cool place for quick bite!!

reviews.author: Leonardo Torres
reviews.text: The Amelie and Hibiscus Lemonade were good. The seating was limited and it was rather cramped.

reviews.author: Taira Marusych
reviews.text: That’s my regular go to spot for coffee before work. Everything was amazing before today, i love the blonde barista guy, he makes everything quick with a great customer service and delicious coffee. Today I went again for my coffee between 11-12 o’clock, there was 1 girl behind the counter, dark hair maybe in her mid 20st, dark eyes. I ordered my regular iced caramel latte and was waiting for it for over 20minutes. First time she made it without milk, while also going back and forth of doing crepes, looking at my order and actually doing it. When I asked where is my milk, she got the new cup, poured milk, poured some of the coffee that she made me before and gave it to me again. There was no caramel, I asked is my caramel was left in the first cup and she looked at me shocked. I understand busy time, a lot of work to do and she was alone, and was waiting with patience. Then i just asked for a refund cuz i had no time left, she called another guy from the downstairs to help and they refunded me my money but the main problem was that they talked shit about me in front of me. Poor customer service, would think about it before coming back. Management should teach how to behave in front of the customers before allowing them go on the floor. Would give the 5 stars just because of the blonde guy barista, but want this issue to be addressed to the management.

reviews.author: Pearl Ryan
reviews.text: Almost not edible. Had to spit it out.

reviews.author: Noah Henderson
reviews.text: Environment was pleasant and the crepes delicious!

reviews.author: bev
reviews.text: i came with a group and the staff was so friendly!! we sat comfortably downstairs and the food and coffee was great.

reviews.text: Crepes were good and the staff was very welcoming. They were able to accommodate my request for no cheese with no problem. Downstairs seating area is cute!

reviews.text: Un clin d'oeil breton. Mais ce ne sont pas nos crêpes 😉. Mais l'endroit est sympa

reviews.author: josie george
reviews.text: Love this place I almost don’t want to leave a review so that people don’t start flocking to it BUT perfect spot to sit and do work or have a coffee date with friends, theres extra seating in the basement and it’s never over crowded, two for one crepes on Wednesdays and Victoria (I think the owner?) is the nicest person! You can tell she cares about the environment of her café.

reviews.author: Elina Yelishevich
reviews.text: Superb! Very good crepes. We tried savory and sweet. Both varieties are great. The service is just amazing. They have bogo on Wednesdays after 2 pm. Great place to stop for lunch after visting the Frick collection.

reviews.author: filippos tsikolas
reviews.text: I had a terrible experience at this place. The food was disgusting and tasted like it was made with no care at all. Everything we ordered was bland, poorly prepared, and honestly not worth eating. It definitely wasn’t worth the money, and he was overcharging for the quality we received. On top of that, the owner had a really bad attitude and was rude throughout the visit, which made the whole experience even worse. I definitely would not recommend this place to anyone.

reviews.author: Sarah
reviews.text: We ordered a Nutella banana three of them. The banana taste artificial so plain and too soft no powdered sugar on top or fancy looking nuts on top just a plain pancake with Nutella and banana inside and the bananas taste artificial.

reviews.author: Joey Lejawa
reviews.text: The vibe is so nice and warm perfect for relaxing or getting some work done. I just had a regular coffee, which was great .

reviews.author: Riccardo Massetti
reviews.text: They saved my life on a freezing cold day with a fantastic cappuccino! Thank you so much.

reviews.author: Ginger R
reviews.text:
I found a piece of plastic inside my crepe, which is a serious food safety concern.
I informed the staff immediately, but there was no apology, no acknowledgment, and no action taken to resolve the situation.
I understand that accidents can happen, but customers should at least receive a sincere apology and proper care when something like this occurs.
I hope the management will take this feedback seriously and improve both food safety and customer service.

reviews.author: Alexandra George
reviews.text: VEry nice but crepes SD HV been thin like French crêpes

reviews.author: Mike K

reviews.author: The Jimersons
reviews.text: Phenomenal crepe experience. Highly recommend the s’mores crepe. Hot chocolate is top three I’ve ever had. Service was impeccable. Amada was a great brand representative. Consider me in Amada’s Armada.

reviews.author: Ashley Jimerson
reviews.text: Wonderful experience! We came back twice during our visit after stumbling on it. Delicious hot chocolate (love the hazelnut hot chocolate) and amazing crepes. We had the s’mores and Provence crepes. Both amazing!! Amada was the sweetest!

reviews.author: Lila Jimerson
reviews.text: I spilled my tea and amada made me a new one! She is so nice! That Provence crêpe is too die for, and that hazelnut hot chocolate is out of this world!!! AMADA DESERVES A RAISE!

reviews.text: Victoria’s crepe is nice!!

reviews.author: Stark Lens Production
reviews.text: This place a very welcoming, the food and drinks are delicious 🤤; customer service is great and Victoria has been amazing whenever I visit here, she’s friendly and helpful; I would definitely recommend this place to anyone that lives near or visiting NYC!

reviews.author: Tim Gilligan
reviews.text: Victoria was so welcoming and makes a great crepe. Will be back.  Such a nice low key spot

reviews.author: Vladimir Kolesnikov
reviews.text: Top shelf service, Victoria was super attentive and friendly. Great environment, great food.

reviews.author: Brittany Guzman
reviews.text: Excellent service thank you- Maria You are very kind and sweet and the crépe was delicious

reviews.author: Maria Toro
reviews.text: Excellent food and service, and Victoria was very kind! Thank you! :)

reviews.author: Clara Toro
reviews.text: The crepe and the hot chocolate were delicious and the service was great! Victoria is bilingual and is very patient and kind!

reviews.author: Yiya Londono
reviews.text: I love this place and Victoria is wonderful!

reviews.author: Xhovana Robi
reviews.text: Incredible place thank you to Amanda for the best Nutella crepe!! The best!

reviews.author: J Mike
reviews.text: Not even 1/10 i paid 17$ to get spinach and one turkey slice , this crepe is going straight garbage because the taste is horrible idk how this is called a crepe . If you getting crepe it’s really not the spot at all . From the pictures you can tell ..

reviews.author: Jeffry Lema Lazo
reviews.text: Wonderful crepes. Would recommend this place. Absolutely love the staff calm place to relax and enjoy.

reviews.author: Irina Roskina
reviews.text: Loved the place. Has a big variety of savory and sweet creps. Very good for breakfast or lunch. Has a big downstears sitting area in addition to top floor.

reviews.author: Bella Ross
reviews.text:
I’m a student at Hunter who comes here multiple times a week. The service is always friendly and fast, even when there are a lot of people. Two of the servers, Amada and Daniel, and both very nice and quick.

Hunter students get a discount and you can also get rewards points which add up to more discounts. That combined with their low prices means their food is pretty inexpensive.

reviews.author: Aleisha Ahmad
reviews.text: yummy delicious crepes and drinks, staff members are incredibly kind :) would come again

reviews.author: Avery Warren
reviews.text: Great space for studying with free wifi and the staff is very friendly.

reviews.author: Nada Khaled
reviews.text: I go there often, and the staff never disappoints! Today I stopped by while on the phone and sat right away, and Daniel immediately recognized me and prepared my regular order without me even having to say it. Always such great service and friendly vibes here!

reviews.author: Bernie Crowl
reviews.text: stood in line for 10 mins with 1 person in line lmao the people that work there have zero energy to them. I left cause it took so long dealing with the lady in front of me, was never even acknowledged.

reviews.author: Haley Martínez
reviews.text: The crepes are delicious and all very friendly excellent service Maria🤩🤩👏🏻

reviews.author: Jill Moed
reviews.text: A terrific place for crepes.Amada went above and beyond by navigating the steps. Love this place.

reviews.author: Lisa Gruson
reviews.text: Great spot for a delicious crepe! Amada was super helpful!

reviews.author: Nazaria Gomez
reviews.text:
A very nice and cozy place!
Staff  is amazing
Maria is so sweet

reviews.author: Gabriel Estrada
reviews.text: Great crepes and coffee. Even better service from Maria!

reviews.author: jenn
reviews.text: Excellent service from the young girl Gabby! She was so kind and the crepe was delicious i love a classic strawberry nutella and she did not disappoint!

reviews.author: Elif Sena Özcan
reviews.text: Super cute café and the crepes are amazing!

reviews.author: beyza mutlu
reviews.text: Great crepes, amazing service ! So glad to find a space like this in NYC. Definitely will come again ♥️

reviews.author: Nazlı Erbay
reviews.text: We had crepes at this café and absolutely loved them! Everything was fresh, delicious, and beautifully served. The staff were friendly and the atmosphere was cozy. Definitely a place we’ll come back to! 🩵

reviews.author: Elle lescher
reviews.text: Food was amazing! Perfect place to get a pick me up treat! Me and my daughter walked in for her birthday and asked worker Gabi what her favorite was. Recommended the chocolate explosion, and it was delicious!

reviews.author: Madeline Blair
reviews.text: Daniel was great! The crepe was amazing. I love eating here.

reviews.author: Khawa kemo
reviews.text: It was really exquisite and beautiful. This cashier name gabby was really nice and helped me choose which crepe I should try.  Awesome place 🫰

reviews.author: B4SK3RV1LLE
reviews.text: cozy atmosphere and good service, i was complimented on my nails by gabby, service was good and server was nice

reviews.author: Izzy
reviews.text: Love this place! Gabriella was so kind and gave great service. Will definitely be coming again!

reviews.author: Paola MF
reviews.text: Dude getting the order was very rude and also giving faces. Never again…

reviews.author: Fanchon
reviews.text:
Au cœur de New York un petit goût de France.
Crêpe à la confiture de framboise 👍 , il ne faut s’attendre à la recette traditionnelle mais c’était très bon 😊

reviews.author: Hila Peled
reviews.text: Great service and crepes

reviews.author: Quasar
reviews.text:
A fast food joint by any other name, but allowing customization  and the option of having them sweet or savory. And given the healthier choices I did not feel ‘guilty’ by consuming fast food.
The only reason for me to go in was to find a warm place while waiting for my entry time at The Frick Collection. And my goal was accomplished.
But don’t expect any frills (that is the job of the  striped paper wall with cute prints ). The vibe is to be efficient and fast.
My crepe was made with buckwheat flour which enhanced the flavor of the smoked salmon served on a dispiriting styrofoam plate . That a Sencha Japanese tea served on a paper cup did its job.

reviews.author: mecca othman
reviews.text: This place is amazing, the staff is always welcoming and so kind. The crepes are always great!! Definitely recommend this place. 10/10!!!

reviews.author: Jayson Laurore
reviews.text:
This is literally the best cafe that I’ve ever experienced. I come here practically every day I’m in the area (weekly), and they remember my regular order, have it made always before I even finish paying, or at times, if they notice me through the window, they automatically start my order so that it’s ready before I even make it to the register. This place is absolutely incredible. Amazing crepes, and the strawberry refresher is the best I’ve had. I genuinely have zero complaints about this place. If you ever pass by, the worker Daniel is the best person you can have serving you. Though all the servers are always kind, Daniel is by far the most welcoming, and friendliest. He’s also the one who remember costumer’s orders. 10/10 place, I wish I could leave more stars.

I will note, that the only thing I wish for this place is that they served fruit bowls or some other variety of food that wasn’t only crepes.

reviews.author: Nour Aziz
reviews.text: smells so good inside, yummy menu, good place to study or hang out :)

reviews.author: Danilo Tamayo
reviews.text:
Excellent customer service, and care for the employees.
Without mention the delicious crepes!
The environment is perfect for a friends talk!

reviews.author: Matthew Padilla
reviews.text: Excellent service and good attention for their customers .

reviews.author: Katlynn Miller
reviews.text: I've been coming here multiple times a week for a while now. Daniel is always here when I come in, and is always super kind!

reviews.author: Isabella Rubio
reviews.text:
We were walking and my friend noticed this place and I don't regret it. The drinks are refreshing, with the perfect sweetness and the crepes are incredible.

Excellent service, very friendly and the food comes out quickly.

Perfect spot for pretty pics

reviews.author: Bob Palgutt
reviews.text: Cute and delicious crepe shop in a really nice area near Central Park and Hunter College. Really nice staff.  Crepes were made to order and delicious. Latte was wonderful.

reviews.author: Sebastian Sanchez oyola
reviews.text: Crêpes are delicious, but the team is the real flavor—friendly, attentive and warm

reviews.author: Niko “Niko”
reviews.text: Nice customer service, expresso gelato was okay. I should’ve gone for crepes. 😅

reviews.author: Natalie Nunez
reviews.text: Service is nice and the chicken pesto crepe is delicious 10/10

reviews.author: Valeria Ricciulli
reviews.text: Really nice space, friendly service, and amazing crepes.

reviews.author: Katie Li
reviews.text: The service wasn’t too friendly and was very slow. The crepe did not taste good.

reviews.author: Fernando Valera
reviews.text:
So due to the nature of my job, I travel a lot through new York. I also enjoy food and trying different things and it just so happened I decided to stop into Vive La Crepe after work to try it out.

The crepes are delicious , I personally had the provence crepe and I really like how it was a balance of sweet and savory. It hit just the spot. I like that all the ingredients were fresh. The time it took to cook wasn't that long at all considering they are made to order.

I also had a mandarin cardamom refresher and it was great too. It was refreshing and sweet without it tasting sugary and they really do add fresh blue berries into the drink (yes I took the time to fish out the blue berries to eat them.

The location itself is a bit on the small side but the ambiance is great for quiet vibes and intimate moments. I recommend anyone looking for a tasty snack to step in and try it out, I know I'm coming back for sure

reviews.author: Natalia Sorokina
reviews.text: Poor dismissive service. Won’t go back.

reviews.author: TJ E.
reviews.text: Service was average and buckwheat crepe was below average. I would not go back.  Most concerning is that one of the workers touching food items was digging in his nose and not washing his hands, I watched him for a several minutes after I ate my crepe. It's disheartening. This was the stocky /shorter man doing this, one time he used a tissue but 3-4 times he used his fingers. The taller man was good and put on gloves and left his nose alone. I think it would beneficial for everyone at this establishment to have a seminar on proper hygiene.

reviews.author: Ana Butler
reviews.text: The flavors here keep pulling me back for more. This restaurant is absolutely outstanding! The employees demonstrate top-tier skills. Each food selection demonstrates culinary excellence. I genuinely adored this place and plan to visit again!

reviews.author: Gallou Khan
reviews.text: Une honte intersidérale. Cela fait plus de 40 minutes qu’on attend des crêpes, ils ont servi tout le monde avant nous et on est toujours pas servi. Pourtant ce n’est pas faute de leur avoir demandé plusieurs fois trois personnes derrière et personne ne fait rien. Ne mettez surtout pas les pieds, j’ai l’impression que quand on est européen, on fait une différence.

reviews.author: Mark Weinress
reviews.text: Really enjoyed this place. Great for a quick lunch or dessert and coffee. Charming with plenty of seating. My lunch crepe tasted fresh and delicious. I'll be back!

reviews.author: Navid Pustchi
reviews.text: She is super rude and disrespectful.

reviews.author: Inshall Abid Mehmood
reviews.text: Super rude and disrespectful, My friend & I said excuse me 9 times & a guy with earrings & a blue cap literally looked at us & ignored us. We were standing right in front of him, so it doesn’t make sense unless he was deaf. The lady at the register was talking our order like we are second class citizens & they had no ingredients in stock + the coffee tasted burnt & was half full

reviews.author: Alexandra L.R.
reviews.text: The service was nice. The venue is designed with a sit-down option to enjoy food with proper tableware. However, my order was served in takeaway packaging. I also paid nearly $20 for one tea (bag, nothing fancy) and one crepe with jam which was undercooked and missing a paid-for ingredient. Staff kindly offered to remake it, but I had already eaten some and felt awkward asking for a refund. I was also charged one dollar extra for the ingredient that was missing, compared to the price listed on the board. Unfortunately, despite the good idea for this type of food, I don’t plan to return.

reviews.author: Quan Zhang
reviews.text: The cutest sofa a crepe shop can have!

reviews.author: Mary
reviews.text: Crepes are tasty but left me, at least with indigestion. I will be back (Buckwheat! GF!) but will watch and see how I do.

reviews.author: THE EXPLORER
reviews.text:
We were walking around the neighborhood last fall and found this cute little coffee chop on the corner.  We had a very nice cup of Americano and a small pastry. Small seating area but very comfortable.  Lots of light from the big corner window.  The lady who took our order was very friendly.
A nice experience and we will definitely stop here again when we are in the neighborhood.

reviews.author: Chirita Cristian
reviews.text: Great crepes, not too crowded

reviews.author: Brian
reviews.text: BAD. Unsanitary. I saw the staff handling garbage (hands in garbage bin), take out the garbage and then continue making crepes without changing gloves. Gross. Customer service sucks. They get your order wrong, it takes forever to get the crepes because the staff is distracted and talking to each other. Cheese was not melted so I was eating thick half melted pieces of hard cheese. Super disappointing because the location is great and design is cute but food and service sucks.

reviews.author: Mark Prins
reviews.text: I need to give this a 5 star. The crepes were lovely and the place felt cozy. ❤️🌲

reviews.author: Vedrana Miladinov
reviews.text: Sooo delicious! Both smoothie and savoury crepe

reviews.author: Lebron James
reviews.text: Delicious food

reviews.author: Johanna Chicaiza
reviews.text: I ordered a hot chocolate. It tasted just sugar and milk not chocolate. I was so sad because I love hot chocolate. Too expensive for the quality of this drink

reviews.author: Winnie
reviews.text:
The crepe is nice so does the decoration, but had a bad experience with the manager.

My friends and I ordered and quickly took some pictures. Manager came to me said loudly that we caused disturbance. When another customer in the store later took our pictures, nobody said anything. I am confused about the difference in treatment here. If there is a certain area in the store we should not photograph, you should put a sign so we know. I am not sure what disturbance we have caused in 5 minutes in a corner table, there is a nicer way to address this situation to us.

reviews.author: Emily Frenkel
reviews.text:
There aren’t too many places you can get a gluten-free crêpe at! I wanted something savory and protein dense. To my surprise, the menu has a buckwheat crêpe with chicken pesto! Solid choice for anyone who eats intuitively and listens to their body.

Customer service was top notch, and the vibe inside is pretty casual. There is some leakage happening by the front door, but that’s a easy fix.

reviews.author: Kayla Nevae
reviews.text: Really good customer service, the manager was a vibe, my crepe was good and got prepared really fast, scenery was relaxing 10/10 experience.

reviews.author: Cloudz.
reviews.text: Wonderful enviorment with a cozy and warm aesthetic. The customer service was great. The manager Raheim was very kind, paitent, and friendly. The refresher was tasty, and the crepe was savory and sweet. Solid 9/10 experience would defintly reccommend and go back there.

reviews.author: Maimoonah Warraich
reviews.text: Amazing 10/10 service. the nutella crepe was delicious. the seating is so comfortable. me and my college friends love going here. the workers here are so kind and welcoming. would recommend to everybody!!

reviews.author: Savleen Kaur Minhas
reviews.text: I've been going here since March and it never fails to disappoint me! My go to is usually a Sugar Lemon Crepe and a Matcha, and seeing it's down the block from my school I'll always have a good pick me up. Staff are amazing!

reviews.author: Eli Mangaoang
reviews.text: rhiti’s customer service went so above and beyond! the food was delicious. my friends and i were having a hard day, but she really brightened it. best believe we will be back! thank you rhiti!!!

reviews.author: misha pb
reviews.text: Such a cute store and the workers were very welcoming. The crepes were so delicious!

reviews.author: Roberta Abela
reviews.text: I like going to this place because of the ambience and crepes but the staff needs thorough training as they are unfortunately ruining what could potentially be a great place. One time one of the persons was sweeping the floor when we came in and then went on to make crepes with the same gloves they had on while sweeping. Just left there and then. Also, the general attitude of the staff is not good at all which is a shame as otherwise it’s a lovely place.

reviews.author: Ariane P
reviews.text: Cute, casual place for a light lunch. Went here with my toddler. He liked his food too. Highly recommend the Chicken Pesto.

reviews.author: Alex Rios
reviews.text: Great little spot, amazing espresso. Cozy and the crepes look amazing.

reviews.author: Dejanire Bernal
reviews.text: I had a Nutella crepe and iced latte. It was delicious, the place is really cute, and the staff super friendly :) I will definitely come back :)

reviews.author: Daniela Duarte
reviews.text: Great place visually. Unfortunately crepes were not that good, good crepe taste but with very little filling. And they did not have gelato. I though it was overpriced for what you get.

reviews.author: Victoria Cecilie Hansen
reviews.text:
Just don't go here...
We waited forever to get two iced lattes and one ice cream (which were awful).. the staff is so slow and non-caring... Everything is out and nothing is prepared to give fast service.. if this was a cooking game they would have lost the level

reviews.author: Nadia Pol
reviews.text:
The latter didn't seem to have any espresso in it (maybe a drip coffee shot), nor any foam....
Not coming back

reviews.author: Brent L
reviews.text:
Found this spot on a rainy NY afternoon while looking for a subway on Upper East side.
Two brothers serving up your choice of crepes and hot or cold cafe drinks. Delicious.
Recommend the chai latte and dulce de leche special!

reviews.author: Lisy V
reviews.text: Love this crepe spot! The ham and cheese crepe was super good as well as their cappuccino.

reviews.author: Ghennah Forde
reviews.text: Got the chicken pesto crepe, taste pretty good. Crepe wasn't crispy though I did take it to go so it might've softened in the Togo cone. Post dental approved. The buckwheat crepe taste alright, if you have texture issues it might not be the best, it's not 100% grainy but close to a fine sand.

reviews.author: Stan
reviews.text:
I recently had the pleasure of dining at Blenoir Crepes, and it was an experience worth sharing. This charming creperie offers a delightful blend of traditional and innovative crepes that cater to both sweet and savory palates.

Menu & Food Quality:
The menu at Blenoir Crepes is impressively diverse, featuring a wide range of both sweet and savory crepes. I opted for the classic ham and cheese crepe, which was perfectly balanced with a generous amount of filling and a golden, crispy exterior. For dessert, the Nutella and banana crepe was simply divine, with the right amount of sweetness and a rich, indulgent flavor. Additionally, the galettes here are a standout – their authentic Breton-style preparation makes them a unique find in the area, offering flavors and textures you won’t easily find elsewhere.

Vibe & Atmosphere:
The ambiance of Blenoir Crepes is cozy and inviting, making it a perfect spot for a casual meal or a relaxed brunch with friends. The décor is charming, with rustic wooden tables and a warm color palette that adds to the overall welcoming feel. The soft background music creates a pleasant atmosphere without being overwhelming. The unique, relaxed vibe of Blenoir Crepes sets it apart from other eateries, providing a tranquil haven in the bustling city.

Service:
The staff at Blenoir Crepes were friendly and attentive, ensuring that my dining experience was smooth from start to finish. They were knowledgeable about the menu and provided excellent recommendations. The service was prompt, and my order arrived in a timely manner despite the restaurant being moderately busy.

Overall Experience:
Blenoir Crepes is a hidden gem that deserves recognition for its delicious crepes, outstanding galettes, and charming atmosphere. While there’s always room for improvement, such as expanding the beverage options or adding more unique crepe varieties, the overall experience was thoroughly enjoyable.

I highly recommend Blenoir Crepes to anyone looking for a delightful crepe experience. It’s a place where you can enjoy well-crafted crepes and galettes in a cozy setting.

5 stars for Blenoir Crepes – a wonderful spot that’s definitely worth a visit!

reviews.author: Gosia Zasańska
reviews.text:
Odwiedziłam to miejsce zupełnie przypadkiem, spacerując po okolicy.
Na miejscu w porze lunchowej sporo osob.

Wybor slodkich i wytrawnych naleśników, a takze napoje i lody.

Wybralam naleśnik bezglutenowy z burrata.
Smaczny, ale bez szalu.
Nie do końca wypieczony, mocno namukl i mialam problem z jedzeniem.
Matcha na napoju migdalowym ok , ale tez bez szalu.
Są lepsza miejsca.

reviews.author: Nick Pan
reviews.text: Sunday staff is 3 fried guys. Food is mid and the iced matcha and iced cappuccino both were mixed terribly. Definitely don’t recommend going for good coffee or good food. Atmosphere is the best part.

reviews.author: Uncommon Beauty Gallery
reviews.text: Unfortunately crepes are grossly undercooked. I asked them to put it back which they did but with little improvement as the crepe was already folded.

reviews.author: Julia K.
reviews.text: Cute little creperie with vintage vibes! You can choose either savoury or sweet crepes, and whether you want buckwheat flour.

reviews.author: Heewon Kim
reviews.text: I loved the crepes and the vibe!!😍please order smores crepes with strawberries

reviews.author: Jitesh Gurav
reviews.text: Went in for a quick bite and chai thinking I would be in and out. Incredibly slow service. Took about an hour to make one crepe and two drinks. Had to repeat my order 4 times to the wait staff before they could figure it out, and they still got our drinks wrong. My partner got a regular latte instead of a decaf capuccino. The crepe did not have the berries because they ran out of it. Experiences like these are when I wish I could give a 0 star.

reviews.author: Abhishek Sharma
reviews.text: “I had a terrible experience at the café. Despite the low occupancy, the staff took an unusually long time to prepare my order. I noticed other customers ordering and leaving before me. Even after reminding them twice about my order, I still had to wait. When I finally received my coffee, it was supposed to be iced, but they made it hot. Frustrated with the poor service, I decided to leave without wasting any more time.”

reviews.author: Corey Chambliss
reviews.text: Authentically European, in the sense that the service is horrendous. Live right nearby but won’t return without improvement.

reviews.author: Ross Ginsberg
reviews.text: Been here twice in the past few weeks and got the same thing each time:  the berry + yogurt crepe and add bananas.  Both times, I watched as the crepe-maker made my order, periodically looking at the receipt to ensure they had it right, and forgetting the bananas and I had to say something to them both times.  Obviously this isn't a life threatening issue.  I can't tell if they hope I don't notice or simply just not paying attention but there's a lack of attention to detail that's pretty annoying

reviews.author: Sydney Vasseur
reviews.text: Great location, I was curious on discovering this place since I’m French and love a good crepe, however the savory crepe wasn’t made out of the right doe (Buckwheat) but instead out of the same doe as the sweet one… very chocking.. I want to come back to see if something has changed because I came in the first month of their opening and I’m hoping to find a good place to go have crepes! 🤞🏽 good luck, hope you take this into account !

reviews.author: Daniela Ramírez
reviews.text: El mejor lugar de crepas en NYC! Las crepas son deliciosas y el lugar es preciosoo 😍

reviews.author: Doris Perez
reviews.text: Great place to enjoy crepes! 😍

reviews.author: Mon González
reviews.text: Obsessed!!!!! My favorite place in my favorite city <3 Thanks for all the great work!!!

reviews.author: Oscar Itu
reviews.text: Great place, great food, great xperience!

reviews.author: Andrea Ruano Arizmendi
reviews.text: Best crêpes in NYC! Soooo aesthetic😍

reviews.author: Olivia Fernández
reviews.text: Best crepes in nyc!!!!!!

reviews.author: Arthur Glauberman
reviews.text: Blenoir Crepes & Cafe is a wonderful cafe that consistently makes perfectly tasting lattes! Their crepe chefs make delicious savory and sweet crepes. Since Blenoir opened a few months ago, i have enjoyed getting my morning lattes and a great breakfast consisting of inexpensive of their delicious crepes!
